action_text: Hover over a small bar near the right end of the chart to show its tooltip
rationale: To identify the agents with the minimum incident count, I should hover a very small bar near the right end of the chart to reveal its tooltip with the agent name and count.

action_text: Hover over the next small bar to the right to read its tooltip
rationale: Hovering the adjacent small bar may reveal another agent’s count; this helps confirm the minimum value and list all agents at that minimum.

action_text: Hover over another small bar near the right side to display its tooltip
rationale: Checking another nearby small bar ensures we capture all agents tied at the lowest count.

action_text: Hover over a small bar slightly left of the rightmost group to see its tooltip
rationale: One more hover slightly further left can surface any additional agents with the same minimal count.
If available, opening the chart options may provide a “Show data” view with a clear table of agent names and counts, making it easier to find the minimum.
